name: omlx-copilot-chat
description: Use oMLX OpenAI-compatible models from the VS Code Copilot Chat model picker.

omlx.baseUrl.description: Base URL for the oMLX OpenAI-compatible API.

omlx.maxInputTokensOverride.description: Optional override for the input token limit advertised for every oMLX model. Set to 0 to auto-detect from model metadata. For Copilot Agent mode, use 65536 or higher if oMLX is configured for that context size.

omlx.maxOutputTokensOverride.description: Optional override for the output token limit advertised for every oMLX model. Set to 0 to use model metadata when available.

omlx.requestTimeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout, in milliseconds, for oMLX model and chat requests.

omlx.enableImageInput.description: Advertise image input support for oMLX models. Enable only for models that accept OpenAI-compatible image_url message parts.

omlx.enableToolCalling.description: Advertise and forward OpenAI-compatible tool calls for oMLX models. Disable if your selected oMLX model/server rejects tool schemas.

omlx.maxToolCount.description: Maximum number of tools to advertise for oMLX Agent mode requests. Lower this if tool schemas are pushing prompts over the model context window.
